description_long: This sconce features a classic candelabra design with three elegantly curved arms extending from a central column, each arm terminating in a candle holder. The structure is crafted from a metallic material with a dark, slightly glossy finish, giving it a vintage and ornate appearance. The central stem is adorned with decorative scrollwork and geometric motifs, adding to its antique charm. The base is wide and scalloped, providing stability and a touch of baroque flair. The overall silhouette is symmetrical, with the arms gracefully arching outward and upward. The sconce is designed to hold three candles, making it suitable for ambient or accent lighting in urban or historical settings.
description: A vintage-style, three-arm metal sconce with ornate scrollwork and a dark, glossy finish, designed to hold three candles. Its symmetrical, decorative form features a scalloped base and elegant curves.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three candle holders and the full symmetry of the arms and decorative central stem.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth of the arms and the scrollwork details on the central column.
description_view_2: Another side-angled view, nearly identical to view 1, emphasizing the ornate curves and the layered base.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the back of the central stem and the curvature of the arms, with less detail visible on the candle holders.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, this fixture features baroque influences with elaborate scrollwork and a scalloped base, evoking a sense of historical elegance.
